case_title: BANCROFT, AVERY & MCALISTER VS NOSSAMAN, GUTHNER, KNOX & ELLIOT

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANCROFT, AVERY & MCALISTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOSSAMAN, GUTHNER, KNOX & ELLIOT $950.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $962.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,804.27 FILED BY BANCROFT, AVERY & MCALISTER AS TO DEFENDANT NOSSAMAN, GUTHNER, KNOX & ELLIOT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 01
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO MICHAEL WILMAR (NOSSA MAN, GUTNEV, KNOX, ELLIOT) RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
